instructions.heading: How to play
instructions.line1: Click anywhere on the canvas to drop a new body at rest.
instructions.line2: Click-and-drag to fling a body with initial velocity.
instructions.line3: Use the controls to pause, reset, or change the time scale.

footer.credit: Built as a weekend toy. No external libraries.
footer.physicsNote: Gravity is simulated with a softened inverse-square law.

errors.stringsLoadFailed: Failed to load strings.json — UI will show placeholders.
errors.canvasUnsupported: Your browser does not support the HTML canvas element.
